stage: Live availability, participant-management drawer, Gantt flow, and Google Voice-blocked chat shell
notes: The MAXIM course/date selector reads docs/data/schedule_future.json and filters by the same public open/direct-booking rules used by the public scheduler. Registration stays hidden until a specific time is selected and then names that course, time, date, and location. Training Flow is searchable and filterable. Clicking a participant opens a drawer for contact/billing/course edits, live scheduling or rescheduling, and safe deactivation that preserves history. Google Voice group chat remains a disabled shell. Worker/D1 remains unverified in production.
